verbatim_quote: It's going to be more costly if I go this side than if I go from that, that side. Yet the difference in action that I can take to choose between those two is, is very small.
gloss: [PREDICTION] It's going to be more costly if I go this side than if I go from that, that side. Yet the difference in action that I can take to choose between those two is, is very small.
